title: Tool Selection, Calls, Results, and State Updates · Failure Case: Tool Routing
summary: Implement a typed client-side tool loop over read and write tools. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops tool routing increment in a tested tool-loop state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select tools from capability, authority, cost, and evidence requirements.
Pause for user direction only when missing authority or a choice materially changes the outcome.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
